summary: The conjecture proposes a characterization of 2-extremal digraphs D satisfying \vec{\chi}(D) = \lambda(D)+1 = 3, complementing the main theorem of arXiv:2304.04690 which handles k=1 and k\geq 3. The verbatim statement could not be extracted from the PDF, and no follow-up paper resolving or substantially advancing this case was found in the indexed literature as of May 2026.
search_queries: Aboulker Aubian Charbit "2-extremal" digraph dichromatic arc-connectivity 2023
dichromatic number arc-connectivity "2-extremal" digraph characterization conjecture Aboulker 2024 2025
notes: No follow-up paper found. The conjecture statement itself was absent from PDF extraction (Section 9 content not available). Searches confirmed the paper is cited in the literature (e.g., survey arXiv:2307.08661) but no resolution of the k=2 case was identified. The conjecture is recent (2023) so open status with high confidence is appropriate.
